title: psyllium squalidum
intro: Psyllium squalidum, also known as Indian squalid, is a type of plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Psyllium squalidum include its ability to aid in digestion, lower cholesterol levels, and help manage blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Psyllium squalidum can be found in the form of capsules, tablets, and powders, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
